entry.description: Entry file(s) relative to data/dinoscript/. Accepts a path string or array of paths/globs.

modules.description: Minecraft Script API modules to include. Each entry must follow the format @scope/name@<semver> (e.g. @minecraft/server@2.0.0).

sourcemap.description: Sourcemap generation mode. Omit to disable sourcemaps. linked = external .map with linking comment; external = external .map without linking comment; inline = embedded in JS.

outfile.description: Output file path for single-entry builds. Also used as the manifest script entry point.

outdir.description: Output directory for multi-entry builds. Requires disableManifestModification when used.

debugBuild.description: Enables source maps and auto-configures .vscode/launch.json for Minecraft JS debugging.

injectSourceMapping.description: Prepends a globalSourceMapping variable to the output JS for runtime stack trace resolution. Requires debugBuild.

manifest.description: Path to the BP manifest file.

oneOf.description: Path to a rolldown config file relative to data/dinoscript/.
Set to false to disable rolldown config file lookup.

rolldownConfig.description: Path to an optional rolldown.config.ts for custom plugins and build overrides. Set to false to disable.
